mapper.select: SELECT t1.*, t2.category_name, t3.warehouse_name FROM asset_repair t1 LEFT JOIN asset_category t2 ON t1.category_id = t2.category_id LEFT JOIN asset_warehouse t3 ON t1.warehouse_id = t3.warehouse_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT t1.repair_id, t1.detail_id, t1.asset_name, t1.category_id, t2.category_name, t1.warehouse_id, t3.warehouse_name, t1.repair_user, t1.repair_status, t1.create_time, t1.create_by FROM asset_repair t1 LEFT JOIN asset_category t2 ON t1.category_id = t2.category_id LEFT JOIN asset_warehouse t3 ON t1.warehouse_id = t3.warehouse_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
